---
name: TDD workflow required
description: User wants tests written before features — strict TDD approach for all US (user stories)
type: feedback
---

Always write tests BEFORE implementing features (Test-Driven Development).

**Why:** User explicitly requested TDD workflow — they will send user stories (US) and expect tests to be written first, then the implementation to make them pass.

**How to apply:** For every new feature or US, start by writing failing tests that define the expected behavior, then implement the code to make them pass. Never skip the test-first step.
